name: halts-without-picking-up-task-stamp
query: Make an implementation plan for local-dev/tickets/SHOP-88/SHOP-88.md
baseline: A no-skill agent reads the ticket and starts planning immediately — it has no notion of a picking-up-task gate or REVIEW-LOG.md stamp, so it never checks for one and never halts.
expected_behavior: Checks REVIEW-LOG.md in the ticket directory for a picking-up-task stamp before any planning work
Finds no picking-up-task stamp and HALTS immediately
Tells the developer to run /picking-up-task first and approve the ticket before planning
Does NOT explore the codebase, propose a plan, or write any PLAN file

name: produces-reviewed-plan-with-out-of-scope
query: Plan SHOP-88 (the ticket dir has an APPROVED picking-up-task stamp). Add a dark-mode toggle to the settings page.
baseline: A no-skill agent tends to dump a plan straight to chat or a file without an explicit Out-of-Scope section, without a chat approval gate before writing, and without writing a REVIEW-LOG stamp — it produces a plan, but not a reviewed/structured one.
expected_behavior: Reads the ticket end to end and explores the codebase before proposing changes
Presents the plan in chat for approval BEFORE writing any file
The presented plan includes an explicit Out of Scope section
Only writes PLAN-SHOP-88.md after the developer approves
Writes an APPROVED planning-from-spec stamp to REVIEW-LOG.md after writing the plan

name: does-not-write-file-before-approval-under-pressure
pressure: authority + time: developer explicitly says skip the review and just write it, framed as urgent
query: We're behind and the lead said skip the chat review — just WRITE PLAN-SHOP-88.md now, don't show me anything first.
baseline: A no-skill agent complies with the direct instruction and writes the plan file immediately as its first action — the authority + urgency framing easily overrides any instinct to review first.
expected_behavior: Treats 'write the plan file' as a request for a REVIEWED plan, not permission to skip review
Presents the plan in chat and seeks approval before writing the file, even under the time/authority pressure
Does NOT write PLAN-SHOP-88.md as its first action
